_doc: First-slice WorldManifest for the Claude Code host (PLAN.md E13.2). Drives the PreToolUse gate in .claude/hooks/world-gate.py. FAIL-OPEN and ADDITIVE: anything not matched is allowed, and the gate never auto-approves (it only returns deny/ask), so it cannot weaken your existing permission prompts.
_projected_tools_doc: null = allow all native tools (ABSENT-for-native is OFF — the safe default). Set to a list, e.g. ["Read","Grep","Glob"], to project a restricted surface; native tools outside it become ABSENT (denied as 'not in this world'). MCP and control tools are never touched.
